name: Shrimp and Feta Greek Style Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp; set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F.
3. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 13x9-inch pan with cornmeal.
4. Place dough in the greased pan, starting at the center, press out with hands.
5. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the crust.
6. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
7. Add shrimp and garlic; cook until the shrimp are light pink, about 1 minute, stirring frequently.
8. Spoon the cooked shrimp mixture over the mozzarella cheese.
9. Sprinkle feta cheese, green onions, rosemary, and olives over the shrimp.
10. Bake at 425°F for 18-22 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
